info.name: HireSmart APIs
info.description: Import-ready Postman collection for the HireSmart AI Laravel API. Third-party API keys stay in laravel/.env; Postman calls the Laravel routes. Collection auth is configured as Bearer {{token}}; login/register scripts also save {{authToken}} for global-style Postman setups.

request.description: Confirms the API routes are reachable.

response.name: 500 - Server/database/config error

request.description: Returns pong with a timestamp.

response.name: 500 - Server/database/config error

request.description: Creates a user and saves the returned Bearer token. Register and Login both use {{user_email}} so credentials stay aligned.

response.name: 500 - Server/database/config error

request.description: Logs in with the same {{user_email}} used by Register and saves the returned Bearer token.

response.name: 500 - Server/database/config error

request.description: Uses Mailboxlayer when configured; otherwise returns a skipped result.

request.description: Creates an internal job and saves job_id.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Laravel Developer",
  "company": "HireSmart Demo Co.",
  "location": "Cebu City",
  "description": "Build Laravel APIs and integrate third-party services.",
  "required_skills": [
    "PHP",
    "Laravel",
    "MySQL",
    "REST API",
    "Git"
  ],
  "nice_to_have_skills": [
    "Docker",
    "AWS"
  ],
  "employment_type": "Full-time",
  "experience_level": "Mid-level",
  "salary_min": 35000,
  "salary_max": 70000,
  "application_deadline": "2026-12-31",
  "is_active": true
}
